agent_trace.summary: [发令中] 已明确识别字画的总目标与关键边界

updates.total_target: 识别并确认给定图片 `fixtures/media/image.jpg` 中字画的详细信息，包括其名称、作者等，并判断其是否为《江南春》。
updates.deadline: 未明确指定，需在后续阶段补充。

boundaries.输入源: 必须以提供的图片 `fixtures/media/image.jpg` 作为唯一识别对象。
boundaries.输出要求: 需提供字画的识别结果（名称、作者等）和与《江南春》的匹配程度。
boundaries.禁止事项: 不得进行字画真伪鉴定或价值评估。
boundaries.允许工具: 可使用图像识别工具和网络搜索辅助识别。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立

updates.tumen_quota: 完成对指定图片 `fixtures/media/image.jpg` 中《江南春》字画的识别任务，总量为1件。

decomposition_rule.万户 (Tumen): 负责《江南春》字画的整体识别任务。
decomposition_rule.千户 (Mingghan): 负责图像的初步分析与特征提取，将图像信息细化为10个关键视觉特征集。
decomposition_rule.百户 (Jagun): 负责对每个关键特征集进行深入比对与验证，将比对结果汇总为10个潜在匹配项。
decomposition_rule.十户 (Arban): 负责对每个潜在匹配项进行最终确认，并形成最终识别报告。

updates.reporting_cycle: 任务完成后立即上报，内容包括识别出的画作名称、依据及置信度。

mingghan_allocations.title: Image Feature Extraction
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the provided image (`fixtures/media/image.jpg`) to extract prominent visual features (e.g., color palette, artistic style, visible objects, general composition).

mingghan_allocations.title: Textual Element Identification
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and extract any textual elements (signatures, seals, inscriptions) present within the image (`fixtures/media/image.jpg`).

mingghan_allocations.title: Initial Web Search - Visual Cues
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct initial web searches using keywords derived from the image's visual description to find potential matches or similar artworks.

mingghan_allocations.title: Initial Web Search - Textual Cues
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct initial web searches using any extracted textual elements (e.g., artist names, seals) to find related information about 'Jiangnan Spring'.

mingghan_allocations.title: Art Database Cross-Reference
mingghan_allocations.description: Cross-reference the extracted features and initial search results with known art databases or historical records specifically for 'Jiangnan Spring' or similar works.

mingghan_allocations.title: Artist Attribution Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Research potential artists associated with the style or textual elements found, focusing on those known for works like 'Jiangnan Spring'.

mingghan_allocations.title: Painting Title Verification
mingghan_allocations.description: Verify if the identified painting matches the title 'Jiangnan Spring' based on historical records, descriptions, or known versions.

mingghan_allocations.title: Authenticity and Provenance Check
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather information regarding the authenticity and provenance of the identified artwork, if possible, based on available data related to 'Jiangnan Spring'.

mingghan_allocations.title: Preliminary Identification Report Compilation
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile all gathered information into a preliminary report, detailing findings, potential matches, and remaining uncertainties regarding the identification of 'Jiangnan Spring'.

mingghan_allocations.title: Final Review and Recommendation
mingghan_allocations.description: Review the preliminary report for accuracy and completeness, and formulate a final identification recommendation regarding 'Jiangnan Spring'.

arban_allocations.title: Initial Image Description
arban_allocations.description: Generate a general textual description of the painting's content using image analysis tools, focusing on prominent visual elements.

arban_allocations.title: Identify Specific Objects and Scene Details
arban_allocations.description: Extract more granular details from the image, such as specific objects, figures, background elements, and overall scene composition.

arban_allocations.title: Detect Textual Elements and Signatures
arban_allocations.description: Scan the image for any readable text, inscriptions, seals, or artist signatures that could aid in identification.

arban_allocations.title: Infer Artistic Style and Period
arban_allocations.description: Analyze visual characteristics to infer the artistic style, school, or historical period of the painting.

arban_allocations.title: Web Search - General Visual Cues
arban_allocations.description: Perform a web search using the general image description and inferred style as keywords to find similar artworks.

arban_allocations.title: Web Search - Specific Identifiers
arban_allocations.description: Conduct targeted web searches using detected textual elements, signatures, or unique object descriptions.

arban_allocations.title: Evaluate Initial Search Results
arban_allocations.description: Review the snippets from web searches to identify promising leads, potential artists, or painting titles.

arban_allocations.title: Fetch Detailed Web Content
arban_allocations.description: Use web_fetch on selected URLs from previous search results to gather comprehensive information about potential matches.

arban_allocations.title: Synthesize Information and Cross-Reference
arban_allocations.description: Consolidate all gathered information (image descriptions, text, search results, fetched content) and cross-reference to narrow down possibilities.

arban_allocations.title: Final Identification and Confidence Report
arban_allocations.description: Based on the synthesized data, make a conclusive identification of the painting and provide a confidence level for the identification.

updates.readiness: All 10 arban subtasks have been allocated and are conceptually ready for mobilization.

arban_allocations.title: Initial Image Description
arban_allocations.description: Generate a general textual description of the painting's content using image analysis tools, focusing on prominent visual elements.

arban_allocations.title: Identify Specific Objects and Scene Details
arban_allocations.description: Extract more granular details from the image, such as specific objects, figures, background elements, and overall scene composition.

arban_allocations.title: Detect Textual Elements and Signatures
arban_allocations.description: Scan the image for any readable text, inscriptions, seals, or artist signatures that could aid in identification.

arban_allocations.title: Infer Artistic Style and Period
arban_allocations.description: Analyze visual characteristics to infer the artistic style, school, or historical period of the painting.

arban_allocations.title: Web Search - General Visual Cues
arban_allocations.description: Perform a web search using the general image description and inferred style as keywords to find similar artworks.

arban_allocations.title: Web Search - Specific Identifiers
arban_allocations.description: Conduct targeted web searches using detected textual elements, signatures, or unique object descriptions.

arban_allocations.title: Evaluate Initial Search Results
arban_allocations.description: Review the snippets from web searches to identify promising leads, potential artists, or painting titles.

arban_allocations.title: Fetch Detailed Web Content
arban_allocations.description: Use web_fetch on selected URLs from previous search results to gather comprehensive information about potential matches.

arban_allocations.title: Synthesize Information and Cross-Reference
arban_allocations.description: Consolidate all gathered information (image descriptions, text, search results, fetched content) and cross-reference to narrow down possibilities.

arban_allocations.title: Final Identification and Confidence Report
arban_allocations.description: Based on the synthesized data, make a conclusive identification of the painting and provide a confidence level for the identification.

updates.readiness: All 10 arban subtasks have been allocated and are conceptually ready for mobilization.
